Title: Muller, Frederik
Overview: Print cataloger. He and Jan Frederik van Someren (1852-1930) wrote a catalog of engraved portraits beginning in 1888. The professor of Art History at Utrecht University, J. G. van Gelder, described Muller's work as one of the praiseworthy graphic studies of Netherlandish of the nineteenth and early twentieth centuries.
Selected Bibliography: Essai d'une bibliographie néerlando-russe; catalogue d'une collection remarquable de livres, atlas, cartes, portraits, planches, manuscrits hollandais, et de plusiers livres étrangers, tous concernant la Russie et la Pologne. Amsterdam: Frederik Muller, 1859; and Someren, Jan Frederik. Beschrijvende catalogus van gegraveerde portretten van Nederlanders . . . Catalogus van 7000 portretten van Nederlanders. 3 vols. Amsterdam: F. Muller, 1888-1891.
